mapper.sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT AA.SR_ID , AA.SR_SEQ , SR_TITLE , REQ_USER_ID , REQ_PHONE , REQ_EMAIL , VARCHAR_FORMAT(REQ_DT,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS REQ_DT , PROC_USER_ID , VARCHAR_FORMAT(PROC_DT,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS PROC_DT , PROC_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PROC_TYPE', PROC_TYPE_CD) AS PROC_TYPE_CD_NM , VARCHAR_FORMAT(START_DT,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS START_DT , PRIORITY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PRIORITY', PRIORITY_CD) AS PRIORITY_CD_NM , REASON , ATTACH_ID , PERSONGROUP , REG_USER_ID , VARCHAR_FORMAT(REG_DT, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS REG_DT , UPD_USER_ID , VARCHAR_FORMAT(UPD_DT, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS UPD_DT , SR_TYPE_CD , SR_TYPE_CD_NM FROM TB_SR AA, ( SELECT SR_ID , SR_SEQ , LISTAGG(SR_TYPE_CD, ',') AS SR_TYPE_CD , LISTAGG(FN_GET_CODE_NM('SR_TYPE', SR_TYPE_CD), ',') AS SR_TYPE_CD_NM FROM TB_SR_LIST GROUP BY SR_ID, SR_SEQ ) BB WHERE AA.SR_ID = BB.SR_ID(+) AND AA.SR_SEQ = BB.SR_SEQ(+) )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SR_ID , A.SR_SEQ , A.ORDER_NO , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , CONTRACT_NO , A.BASELINE_ID , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_TYPE', B.RESOURCE_TYPE_CD) AS RESOURCE_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_CATEGORY', B.RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD) AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD_NM , VARCHAR_FORMAT(QUANTITY, '999,999,999,999') AS QUANTITY , B.UNITS , RATE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RATE_TYPE', RATE_TYPE_CD) AS RATE_TYPE_CD_NM , SR_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('SR_TYPE', SR_TYPE_CD) AS SR_TYPE_CD_NM , VARCHAR_FORMAT(START_DT,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS START_DT , PROC_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PROC_TYPE', PROC_TYPE_CD) AS PROC_TYPE_CD_NM , VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.AMOUNT AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') AS AMOUNT , REMARK , A.REG_USER_ID , VARCHAR_FORMAT(A.REG_DT, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS REG_DT , A.UPD_USER_ID , VARCHAR_FORMAT(A.UPD_DT, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS UPD_DT , A.PROC_TYPE_CD , A.HOST_NM FROM TB_SR_LIST A, TB_BILL_RESOURCE B WHERE A.BASELINE_ID = B.BASELINE_ID(+) )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SR_ID , SR_SEQ , EMAIL_RECEIVE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('EMAIL_RECEIVE_TYPE', EMAIL_RECEIVE_TYPE_CD) AS EMAIL_RECEIVE_TYPE_CD_NM , PERSONID , NAME AS DISPLAYNAME , EMAIL AS EMAILADDRESS FROM TB_SR_RECEIVE_USER )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_SR_LIST ( TB_SR_LISTID ,SR_ID ,SR_SEQ ,ORDER_NO ,CONTRACT_TYPE_CD ,CONTRACT_NO ,BASELINE_ID ,QUANTITY ,RATE_TYPE_CD ,SR_TYPE_CD ,START_DT ,PROC_TYPE_CD ,AMOUNT ,REMARK ,HOST_NM ) VALUES
( NEXTVAL FOR TB_SR_LISTIDSEQ , #{SR_ID} , #{SR_SEQ} , #{detail.ORDER_NO} , '' , '' , #{detail.BASELINE_ID} , CAST(REPLACE(#{detail.QUANTITY}, ',', '') AS INTEGER) , #{detail.RATE_TYPE_CD} , #{detail.SR_TYPE_CD} , DATE(TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{detail.START_DT}, '/', ''), 'YYYYMMDD')) , '001' , CAST(REPLACE(#{detail.AMOUNT}, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(16, 3)) , #{detail.REMARK} , #{detail.HOST_NM} )
